name: autogit
description: Auto stage → secrets-scan → commit → push after every agent turn, strictly per-repo opt-in (/autogit on). One-command undo, quiet batching, PR mode.

interface.shortDescription: Auto-commit and push opted-in agent work.
interface.longDescription: autogit stages, scans, commits, and pushes changes after agent turns in repositories where you explicitly opt in, with one-command undo, quiet batching, and PR mode.
